LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionBrainBurn.label: flesh-burned brain
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionBrainBurn.descri: The colony’s psychic pattern has burned through this pawn’s nervous system, leaving thought and motion unstable while the flesh slowly repairs the damage.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionStupor.label: flesh-induced stupor
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionStupor.descripti: The pawn’s mind has gone silent while the colony overwrites resistance and binds the body into its shared rhythm.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionDeathShock.label: failed flesh acceptance shock
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversionDeathShock.descr: This body died while being forced into the colony’s pattern. If restored, it will remain weakened while the new bond stabilizes.
